title: vicia japonica var. pallida
intro: Vicia japonica var. pallida is an Asian species of vetch, a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae), native to China, Japan, and Korea. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia japonica var. pallida include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
